name: Berry Chocolate Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen sliced strawberries (thawed in syrup)
1 package (8 oz for regular crust; 12 oz for deep dish crust)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, combine the chocolate chips and milk.
2. Microwave on MEDIUM (50% power) for 1 1/2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds until the chocolate is completely melted and smooth.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Pour the chocolate mixture into the baked pie crust and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
5. Before serving, stir together the thawed strawberries and whipped topping in a medium bowl.
6. Spread the strawberry mixture over the chocolate layer.
7. Garnish with chocolate nonpareils (optional).
